title.zh: Why Australian Brands Choose Kellogg Fashion?
title.en: Why Australian Brands Choose Kellogg Fashion?

title.zh: Premium Heavyweight Streetwear Built for Australia
title.en: Premium Heavyweight Streetwear Built for Australia

description.zh: Australian fashion brands choose Kellogg Fashion because we specialise in premium heavyweight streetwear designed for modern retail markets. Our signature heavyweight hoodies are available in 500GSM, 580GSM, and 640GSM, offering the substantial feel, oversized silhouette, and durability that Australian consumers expect. From Sydney to Melbourne, brands rely on our products to deliver premium quality that stands out in a competitive streetwear landscape.
description.en: Australian fashion brands choose Kellogg Fashion because we specialise in premium heavyweight streetwear designed for modern retail markets. Our signature heavyweight hoodies are available in 500GSM, 580GSM, and 640GSM, offering the substantial feel, oversized silhouette, and durability that Australian consumers expect. From Sydney to Melbourne, brands rely on our products to deliver premium quality that stands out in a competitive streetwear landscape.

title.zh: Complete Private Label Manufacturing Solutions
title.en: Complete Private Label Manufacturing Solutions

description.zh: We provide end-to-end OEM and private label services tailored to Australian brands of all sizes. From custom fabric development and pattern making to screen printing, embroidery, garment dyeing, and specialty washing, every detail can be fully customised. With low minimum order quantities starting at just 100 pieces per colour, both startup labels and established retailers can launch new collections efficiently and confidently.
description.en: We provide end-to-end OEM and private label services tailored to Australian brands of all sizes. From custom fabric development and pattern making to screen printing, embroidery, garment dyeing, and specialty washing, every detail can be fully customised. With low minimum order quantities starting at just 100 pieces per colour, both startup labels and established retailers can launch new collections efficiently and confidently.

title.zh: Consistent Quality That Protects Your Brand
title.en: Consistent Quality That Protects Your Brand

description.zh: Quality control is integrated into every stage of our production process. Each garment undergoes comprehensive testing for fabric weight, shrinkage, colour fastness, and seam strength. Our heavyweight fleece maintains its structure after repeated washing, with shrinkage consistently kept below 3%. This level of consistency helps Australian brands reduce returns, improve customer satisfaction, and strengthen long-term brand loyalty.
description.en: Quality control is integrated into every stage of our production process. Each garment undergoes comprehensive testing for fabric weight, shrinkage, colour fastness, and seam strength. Our heavyweight fleece maintains its structure after repeated washing, with shrinkage consistently kept below 3%. This level of consistency helps Australian brands reduce returns, improve customer satisfaction, and strengthen long-term brand loyalty.

title.zh: Fast Delivery and Reliable Global Partnership
title.en: Fast Delivery and Reliable Global Partnership

description.zh: Australian clients value our responsive communication, fast turnaround times, and dependable international shipping. Sample development is typically completed within 7 to 10 days, while bulk production is finished in 20 to 30 days. Combined with factory-direct pricing, flexible customisation, and extensive experience serving global streetwear brands, Kellogg Fashion is the trusted manufacturing partner Australian brands rely on for sustainable growth.
description.en: Australian clients value our responsive communication, fast turnaround times, and dependable international shipping. Sample development is typically completed within 7 to 10 days, while bulk production is finished in 20 to 30 days. Combined with factory-direct pricing, flexible customisation, and extensive experience serving global streetwear brands, Kellogg Fashion is the trusted manufacturing partner Australian brands rely on for sustainable growth.

question.zh: Q: What is your minimum order quantity for Australian brands?
question.en: Q: What is your minimum order quantity for Australian brands?

answer.zh: A: Our MOQ starts from 100 pieces per design, which is ideal for Australian startups and growing streetwear brands.
answer.en: A: Our MOQ starts from 100 pieces per design, which is ideal for Australian startups and growing streetwear brands.

question.zh: Q: Do you work with startup clothing brands in Australia?
question.en: Q: Do you work with startup clothing brands in Australia?

answer.zh: A: Yes, we specialize in working with Australian startup brands. We provide low MOQ, sampling support, and guidance for new clothing labels.
answer.en: A: Yes, we specialize in working with Australian startup brands. We provide low MOQ, sampling support, and guidance for new clothing labels.

question.zh: Q: How much does it cost to manufacture hoodies or T-shirts?
question.en: Q: How much does it cost to manufacture hoodies or T-shirts?

answer.zh: A: Pricing depends on fabric weight (GSM), design complexity, and quantity. Our factory-direct pricing is typically 30–50% more competitive than local Australian production.
answer.en: A: Pricing depends on fabric weight (GSM), design complexity, and quantity. Our factory-direct pricing is typically 30–50% more competitive than local Australian production.

question.zh: Q: What GSM options do you offer for hoodies and T-shirts?
question.en: Q: What GSM options do you offer for hoodies and T-shirts?

answer.zh: A: We offer 240–380 GSM for T-shirts and 320–500 GSM for hoodies, ideal for Australian streetwear and seasonal collections.
answer.en: A: We offer 240–380 GSM for T-shirts and 320–500 GSM for hoodies, ideal for Australian streetwear and seasonal collections.

question.zh: Q: How long does sampling take?
question.en: Q: How long does sampling take?

answer.zh: A: Sample production usually takes 7–10 days, depending on customization requirements.
answer.en: A: Sample production usually takes 7–10 days, depending on customization requirements.

question.zh: Q: What is your production lead time?
question.en: Q: What is your production lead time?

answer.zh: A: Bulk production typically takes 15–25 days after sample approval.
answer.en: A: Bulk production typically takes 15–25 days after sample approval.

question.zh: Q: Can you fully customize hoodies and T-shirts?
question.en: Q: Can you fully customize hoodies and T-shirts?

answer.zh: A: Yes, we provide full OEM/ODM services including fabric selection, printing, embroidery, labeling, and packaging.
answer.en: A: Yes, we provide full OEM/ODM services including fabric selection, printing, embroidery, labeling, and packaging.

question.zh: Q: Do you offer private label clothing manufacturing?
question.en: Q: Do you offer private label clothing manufacturing?

answer.zh: A: Yes, we support private label production for Australian brands, including custom logos, tags, and packaging.
answer.en: A: Yes, we support private label production for Australian brands, including custom logos, tags, and packaging.

question.zh: Q: Do you ship to Australia? How long does shipping take?
question.en: Q: Do you ship to Australia? How long does shipping take?

answer.zh: A: Yes, we ship to Australia via air or sea. Air shipping takes 5–10 days, while sea shipping takes 20–30 days.
answer.en: A: Yes, we ship to Australia via air or sea. Air shipping takes 5–10 days, while sea shipping takes 20–30 days.

question.zh: Q: How do you ensure product quality?
question.en: Q: How do you ensure product quality?

answer.zh: A: We have strict quality control processes, including fabric inspection, production checks, and final inspection before shipment.
answer.en: A: We have strict quality control processes, including fabric inspection, production checks, and final inspection before shipment.

question.zh: Q: Do you offer oversized or streetwear fits?
question.en: Q: Do you offer oversized or streetwear fits?

answer.zh: A: Yes, oversized and relaxed fits are our specialty, widely used by Australian streetwear brands.
answer.en: A: Yes, oversized and relaxed fits are our specialty, widely used by Australian streetwear brands.
